home_page_qr_scan: Scan QR code to download on mobile
home_page_apple_china_unavailable: It is temporarily unavailable to download and play in mainland China.
home_page_apple_id: If you already have an Apple ID from other regions, you can download it and play.
home_page_apple_button_tutorial: How to download in mainland China
home_page_web_to_mobile: Add web version to mobile desktop
home_page_news_title: The latest web version is online
home_page_news_subtitle: Can be played on computer web pages, iOS and Android mobile phone web pages
glossary_text_1: Learning the terminologies is an important step to learning any discipline. If players cannot understand the terminologies, it will become a major obstacle in their learning process.
glossary_text_2: Texas Hold'em Poker is a foreign game that has a long history of gameplay and strategy development. In the lengthy process of exchange and research, not only have a large number of professional terms been created, but even many slang expressions have become deeply embedded in the everyday language of the American people.
glossary_text_3: Although poker culture is still unfamiliar to domestic players, and the strategic environment is still in its early stages, being able to master and learn the terminology will be an important guarantee for your technical progress and understanding of poker culture.
apple_tutorial_china_accounts_unable: Apple iPhone accounts registered in mainland China are currently unable to download the GoPlay360 app. You can re-register an Apple iPhone account from another country or region to download it. Alternatively, you can access the web version of GoPlay360 to play without downloading. The GoPlay360 web version supports PC, iOS, and Android phones.
apple_tutorial_web_address: The following is the web address for the GoPlay360 web version. Click on the web link to access it:
apple_tutorial_step_one: 1. Register a new Apple ID and download GoPlay360
apple_tutorial_step_one_sentence_one: Open the web page on your computer:
apple_tutorial_step_one_sentence_two: Scroll to the bottom of the page to create a new Apple ID
apple_tutorial_step_one_sentence_three: Fill in the required information according to the registration requirements. (Be sure to record the security questions you answered during registration)
apple_tutorial_step_one_sentence_four: If the Apple ID cannot be registered normally, it may be a network issue. Please try switching networks or turning airplane mode on and off.
apple_tutorial_step_two: 2. Log in to the IOS AppStore
apple_tutorial_step_two_sentence_one: Log into the App Store on your iOS device with the Apple ID you just registered for the mainland China region.
apple_tutorial_step_two_sentence_two: Enter the new registered account and password in the App Store. Since this is the first time logging into the App Store with the new account, a verification pop-up will appear after clicking 'Log In'. Click 'Verify' as shown in the image below:
apple_tutorial_step_two_sentence_three: Select the payment method as 'None' and then click 'Next'.
apple_tutorial_step_two_sentence_four: After completing the process, log out of the new account.
apple_tutorial_step_three_sentence_two: Log in to the account you just registered and click 'Edit' in the upper right corner.
apple_tutorial_step_three_sentence_four: Change the country/region to the United States, and fill in the corresponding information. The information can be obtained from the overseas address generation tool above.
apple_tutorial_step_three_sentence_five: After selecting the country or region you want to change to, there will be a pop-up window as shown in the image below. Click 'Continue to Update'.
apple_tutorial_step_three_sentence_six: Then you can directly select the payment method as 'None'.
apple_tutorial_step_three_sentence_seven: Finally, fill in the remaining information with the address information you prepared in advance, then click 'Done' in the top right corner.
apple_tutorial_step_four_sentence_one: Log in with the newly registered Apple ID. The App Store language will now be switched to the corresponding country's language.
apple_tutorial_step_four_sentence_two: In the search bar, search for 'GoPlay360' and click 'GET' to download it.
apple_tutorial_step_four_sentence_three: Note: If you previously downloaded the 'GoPlay360' app using a mainland China account, please uninstall it first before reinstalling.
h5_what_is_h5_body: H5 is a collection of technologies for creating interactive effects on web pages, meaning H5 refers to web pages for mobile devices. H5 games are a type of game that can be played instantly, loaded in the browser without needing to download or install anything. Logging into the H5 version of GoPlay360 means it doesn't take up storage space, and you can play together with players on both iOS and Android phones.
h5_link_header_three: to open the link for the H5 mobile version of GoPlay360
h5_add_to_home_screen: Add the GoPlay360 H5 (web app) to your mobile home screen
h5_step_one: 1. Open the GoPlay360 website in your mobile browser (use Safari for iPhone):
h5_step_two: 2. Click on the share icon at the bottom of the page.
h5_step_three: 3. Scroll down the page and click 'Add to Home Screen'.
h5_step_five: 5. You can now see the GoPlay360 icon on your mobile home screen.
